eligibility_core: Active SCE electric account; non-residential; not classified as agricultural or industrial (per site language); additional requirements may apply
general_requirements: Equipment must meet CA eTRM package; rebate reservation before installation; submit within 60 days of installation or before 12/01/2025 (sooner of the two); used/rebuilt equipment not eligible
cia_links: HPWH 120g CIA PDF; ASH & RCD CIA PDF; Other Measures CIA PDF
